summary: User confirmed the order message format change and requested a specific header format. Successfully updated the order message header from the longer version with 'YANGI BUYURTMA KELDI!' to the shorter '🚕 ASSALOMU ALEYKUM HURMATLI TAXI HAYDOVCHILARI 🆕 #1234' format. Applied this change consistently across both main order groups and additional order groups to ensure uniform messaging.
current_status: The userbot system has been fully converted from account-based messaging to bot-based messaging with inline buttons, and the order message format has been finalized according to user specifications. The system is ready for deployment with the new cleaner header format and convenient button interface for taxi drivers.
